metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the internal domain.

children.name: Unified revenue data model
children.description: Normalizes leads, accounts, contacts, opportunities, and territories into one source of truth.

children.name: Identity and account matching
children.description: Deduplicates contacts and maps signals to the correct account and owner.

children.name: Rules-based routing engine
children.description: Automatically assigns leads and opportunities according to commercial policy.

children.name: Propensity and deal scoring
children.description: Ranks opportunities by expected value, urgency, and conversion probability.

children.name: Stage-gated workflow orchestration
children.description: Triggers required steps, checklists, and approvals by deal type and amount.

children.name: Cross-functional approval workspace
children.description: Coordinates pricing, legal, security, and finance approvals in one thread.

children.name: Forecasting and scenario planning
children.description: Generates commit, best-case, and downside views by segment and team.

children.name: Pipeline risk intelligence
children.description: Flags missing stakeholders, stalled stages, weak activity, and atypical discounting.

children.name: Order-to-booking integration
children.description: Pushes approved commercial terms into billing, ERP, and implementation systems.

children.name: Structured handoff package
children.description: Transfers scope, stakeholders, risks, and success criteria to downstream teams.

children.name: Workflow telemetry
children.description: Tracks time spent, step latency, and manual touches across the commercial process.

children.name: AI copilot for sales execution
children.description: Produces summaries, next-step suggestions, and first-draft content inside the workflow.

children.name: Quote and proposal automation
children.description: Creates compliant quotes and proposal packs from approved catalog and pricing rules.

children.name: Manager operating dashboard
children.description: Surfaces deal health, rep activity quality, and forecast variance at team level.

children.name: Playbook recommendation engine
children.description: Suggests coaching actions based on historical win patterns and current deal context.

children.name: Causal performance analytics
children.description: Connects usage, behavior changes, and business outcomes with cohort-based analysis.

children.name: ICP modeling and segmentation
children.description: Analyzes historical win data and firmographics to define high-conversion segments.

children.name: Audience management layer
children.description: Creates dynamic audience cohorts across CRM, product, and web data.

children.name: Campaign orchestration workflow
children.description: Coordinates content, channel timing, budget allocation, and approvals.

children.name: Multi-channel attribution system
children.description: Tracks touchpoints across channels and ties them to pipeline creation.

children.name: Lead scoring engine
children.description: Combines behavioral and firmographic signals into qualification scores.

children.name: SLA tracking and routing
children.description: Ensures timely sales follow-up and monitors acceptance rates.

children.name: Revenue-linked ROI analytics
children.description: Connects campaign spend to closed-won revenue and payback period.

children.name: Experimentation framework
children.description: Enables A/B testing and incremental lift measurement across channels.

children.name: Messaging governance hub
children.description: Centralizes brand guidelines, messaging pillars, and content approvals.

children.name: Brand sentiment analytics
children.description: Aggregates social, web, and campaign engagement data into brand health indicators.

children.name: Brand-to-revenue attribution
children.description: Links long-term engagement signals to revenue lift and pricing resilience.

children.name: Omnichannel case intake
children.description: Brings all support channels into a single queue and customer record.

children.name: AI-assisted triage and classification
children.description: Predicts intent, priority, language, and probable resolver group.

children.name: Unified customer timeline
children.description: Aggregates account events, transactions, support history, and product telemetry.

children.name: Entitlement and SLA engine
children.description: Applies support terms, escalation thresholds, and response commitments automatically.

children.name: Knowledge and runbook system
children.description: Suggests relevant articles, diagnostics, and resolution steps based on case context.

children.name: Cross-functional swarm workspace
children.description: Creates structured collaboration with owners, SLAs, and status tracking for escalations.

children.name: Resolution automation
children.description: Executes standard actions such as password resets, refunds, credits, and access changes.

children.name: Root cause capture
children.description: Structures issue taxonomy and post-resolution learning for analytics and prevention.

children.name: Issue pattern analytics
children.description: Clusters case themes and quantifies impact by product, segment, and channel.

children.name: Self-service portal and bot orchestration
children.description: Resolves common requests without agent intervention while preserving escalation paths.

children.name: Policy-aware workflow automation
children.description: Automates refunds, entitlement checks, and account updates within approved thresholds.

children.name: Closed-loop insight routing
children.description: Creates prioritized feedback items and owner accountability across functions.

children.name: Retention risk scoring
children.description: Combines service burden with product and account signals to flag churn risk.

children.name: Role and entitlement model
children.description: Applies separation-of-duties, delegated authority, and least-privilege standards.

children.name: Contextual approval orchestration
children.description: Routes transactions to Finance, Legal, Security, or Compliance only when policy requires it.

children.name: Exception management
children.description: Documents deviations, compensating controls, owners, and expiry dates.

children.name: Control evidence ledger
children.description: Stores timestamps, approvers, versions, supporting files, and decision rationale.

children.name: Document and clause intelligence
children.description: Extracts key obligations, terms, and missing artifacts from contracts and policies.

children.name: Risk monitoring dashboard
children.description: Aggregates exposures, overdue actions, and trends by function, geography, and process.

children.name: Remediation workflow management
children.description: Tracks corrective actions, owners, due dates, and evidence of closure.

children.name: Cross-system control data pipeline
children.description: Combines ERP, HRIS, CRM, ticketing, and contract records for reconciliation and testing.

children.name: Automated controls testing
children.description: Runs repeatable tests and flags failures or anomalies for review.

children.name: Anomaly detection
children.description: Finds unusual transactions, patterns, or combinations that merit investigation.

children.name: Audit pack generator
children.description: Compiles evidence, control results, approvals, and exceptions into review-ready outputs.

children.name: Shared platform services
children.description: Offers reusable primitives so product teams avoid rebuilding common capabilities.

children.name: API and event gateway
children.description: Standardizes service contracts, discovery, authentication, and event routing.

children.name: Internal developer portal
children.description: Provides service catalogs, templates, runbooks, and environment automation.

children.name: Workflow template library
children.description: Accelerates common internal process design with approved reusable patterns.

children.name: Engineering flow analytics
children.description: Measures cycle time, deployment frequency, queue delays, and dependency impact.

children.name: Operational observability layer
children.description: Connects workflow execution, service health, and customer impact signals.

children.name: Policy-as-code guardrails
children.description: Applies deployment, access, data, and workflow standards automatically.

children.name: Technical exception registry
children.description: Tracks deviations, owners, expiry, and remediation plans.

children.name: System and workflow inventory
children.description: Creates visibility into tool overlap, integration debt, and manual workarounds.

children.name: Value and dependency modeling
children.description: Quantifies savings, risk, and migration dependency for each consolidation move.

children.name: Integration adapters and migration toolkit
children.description: Accelerates migration from legacy tools while preserving continuity.

children.name: Unified employee workspace
children.description: Gives end users a consistent action layer across departments and use cases.

children.name: Enterprise metric layer
children.description: Creates one canonical definition and lineage for executive KPIs.

children.name: Cross-domain semantic model
children.description: Links revenue, support, finance, product, and risk data into consistent dimensions.

children.name: Executive control tower
children.description: Provides live dashboards and drill-through across company-level KPIs and risk indicators.

children.name: Scenario planning engine
children.description: Models the effect of hiring, pricing, tooling, market, and process changes on outcomes.

children.name: Strategic initiative orchestration
children.description: Links goals, workstreams, owners, dependencies, and KPI movement.

children.name: Exception and escalation routing
children.description: Escalates material deviations, threshold breaches, and unresolved blockers to the right leaders.

children.name: Enterprise value decomposition
children.description: Breaks value into revenue, margin, productivity, and risk components tied to workflows.

children.name: Portfolio capital allocation model
children.description: Ranks investments by expected economic impact, dependencies, and time-to-value.

children.name: Enterprise data asset layer
children.description: Compounds learning from all workflows into reusable models and benchmarks.

children.name: Extension and ecosystem framework
children.description: Allows future monetization and faster expansion across partners, subsidiaries, or acquired entities.
